tool_name: Compressed Air System Leak Loss Quantification & Repair ROI

inputs.name: System Operating Pressure (P_sys)
inputs.uncertainty_source: IEC 61298-2:2008 §4.2 — Transducer accuracy class 1.0: ±1% of span

inputs.name: Observed Load/Unload Duty Cycle (loaded fraction)
inputs.note: Measure with cycle timer: loaded time / total cycle time
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: Estimated Legitimate Demand (% of compressor capacity)
Compressor Specific Power
inputs.note: Typical oil-flooded rotary screw at 7 bar(g): 5.5–7 kW/(m³/min)

inputs.name: Annual Operating Hours
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Discrete count variable, zero measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Electricity Tariff
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7 — Market parameter Type B: cost/price estimates ±5%

inputs.name: Estimated Total Leak Repair Cost
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7 — Market parameter Type B: cost/price estimates ±5%

formulas: leak_fraction = load_unload_ratio - baseline_demand_pct/100   // [fraction] Leak Fraction of Compressor Output Reference: DOE Compressed Air Challenge — Fundamentals §3.2
P_leak_kw = compressor_power_kw * Math.max(leak_fraction, 0)   // [kW] Wasted Compressor Power Due to Leaks Reference: ISO 11011:2013 §7.3 — leak power calculation
Q_leak_m3min = P_leak_kw / specific_power_kw_m3min   // [m³/min] Leaked Air Flow Rate Equivalent Reference: CAGI Data Sheet method — volume flow from specific power
E_leak_kwh_yr = P_leak_kw * operating_hours_yr   // [kWh/yr] Annual Wasted Energy — Leaks
leak_cost_usd_yr = E_leak_kwh_yr * electricity_rate_usd_kwh   // [USD/yr] Annual Cost of Leakage Reference: ISO 11011:2013 §8 — monetised loss

V1.error_msg: Duty cycle below demand estimate: leak fraction is zero — re-measure duty cycle during production

V2.error_msg: Leak fraction >40%: measurement or demand estimate may be unreliable — validate with ultrasonic leak detection

V3.error_msg: High pressure with low specific power: verify compressor data — possible instrument error

smart_warnings.message: Leak fraction >20%: ISO 11011 threshold exceeded — immediate ultrasonic leak detection survey mandatory
Repair payback < 6 months: high-priority action — schedule within current maintenance cycle
Repair payback > 24 months: re-evaluate repair scope — prioritise high-flow leaks first (orifice Q ∝ d²)
Leaked flow >30% of compressor capacity: system pressure stability compromised — repair before load expansion
High utilisation: consider automated leak monitoring (ultrasonic IoT sensors) for continuous detection per DOE guidelines

fmea.effect: Duty cycle below demand estimate: leak fraction is zero — re-measure duty cycle during production
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Leak fraction >40%: measurement or demand estimate may be unreliable — validate with ultrasonic leak detection
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: High pressure with low specific power: verify compressor data — possible instrument error
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Leak fraction >20%: ISO 11011 threshold exceeded — immediate ultrasonic leak detection survey mandatory
Repair payback < 6 months: high-priority action — schedule within current maintenance cycle
Repair payback > 24 months: re-evaluate repair scope — prioritise high-flow leaks first (orifice Q ∝ d²)
Leaked flow >30% of compressor capacity: system pressure stability compromised — repair before load expansion
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: Q_leak_m3min > compressor_power_kw / specific_power_kw_m3min * 0.3

fmea.failureMode: High utilisation: consider automated leak monitoring (ultrasonic IoT sensors) for continuous detection per DOE guidelines
